About Me

Here are a few things you should know

Bio

Hi, my name is Brendon and I'm a JavaScript web developer.

As a JavaScript web developer, I constantly aim to write code that is easy to read, is modular and easy to maintain and update.

I know how annoying it can be to look at a codebase and be confused as to what's happening, even if you understand the technology.

I also love learning new technologies, learning more about technologies I'm already familiar with and I have a perpetual sense of feeling like I can learn more and improve.

So, that's a little about me.

If you'd like to know more, you can contact me here and if you look below, you'll find some information about the technologies I am competent in using.

HTML5

HTML is the backbone of the web and I pride myself on being able to write the most semantically correct and accessible HTML possible.

CSS3

Many people either dislike CSS or outright hate it. Of course, CSS is awesome and the web would be a very dull place without it, but CSS can be a pain to work with.

Well, I don't mind it since I write CSS that is modular and easy to maintain.

This means fewer headaches and more great looking UI's.

JavaScript

JavaScript is what breaths some dynamic life into otherwise static web pages.

I love writing JavaScript that is easy to maintain, read and improve

Bootstrap

Bootstrap is a great way to quickly create great looking UI and visuals for web page users.

It's great for prototyping and final products.

I understand how to use, maintain, update and improve upon the Bootstrap library.
